mainEntity.name: Can I get fired for filing a workers' comp claim in Boise, Idaho?
mainEntity.text: Can I get fired for filing a workers' comp claim in Boise, Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Idaho law prohibits retaliation for filing a good-faith workers' compensation claim. Employers cannot fire, demote, or discriminate against you for pursuing benefits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho Code §72-804 bans retaliation. Evidence like timing of termination after claim filing supports wrongful discharge suits. Idaho Industrial Commission handles claims; retaliation claims go to court. Employers often disguise retaliation as performance issues—document everything and seek Boise-area counsel to counter.

name: Retaliation Protections for Idaho Workers' Comp Claims
